project_metadata.name: CedulaScan Pro
project_metadata.archetype: Archetype 2: Performance Pro (Adapted for Data Integrity)
project_metadata.description: Professional React Native Expo mobile app for real-time Colombian ID (cedula) scanning. Emphasizes speed, zero-duplication guarantees, and high-contrast data visualization.

typography.font_family: System (San Francisco on iOS, Roboto on Android) or Inter if using custom fonts

buttons.primary: bg-[#007AFF] text-white rounded-xl py-4 px-6 font-bold flex flex-row justify-center items-center active:opacity-80
buttons.danger: bg-[#FF3B30] text-white rounded-xl py-4 px-6 font-bold flex flex-row justify-center items-center
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-zinc-700 text-white rounded-xl py-4 px-6 font-bold

cards.dashboard_stat: bg-[#141414] border border-zinc-800 rounded-2xl p-6 flex flex-col justify-between

inputs.text: bg-[#141414] border border-zinc-800 rounded-xl px-4 py-4 text-white font-medium focus:border-[#007AFF]

Login.layout: Centered content over dark abstract background image

EventSelection.layout: SafeAreaView with ScrollView list of events

Scanner.layout: Full-screen camera view with bottom sheet for manual entry/recent scans
elements: Top Bar (Event Name, Sync Status Indicator, Device Active Count)
Scan Item (Cedula, Timestamp, Device ID, Status (Success/Duplicate))

scan_feedback.duplicate: Haptic feedback (Heavy/Error), Screen flashes red edges, Toast '¡Cédula Duplicada! Registrada hace Xs' (Red background)

offline_mode.indicator: Top bar sync icon turns Amber/Red, shows 'Modo Offline - X en cola'
offline_mode.sync_action: Auto-syncs when WebSocket reconnects, shows spinning sync icon

login_background.description: Abstract dark mode data visualization background used for the login screen.

event_thumbnail_1.description: Concert crowd reference image for event list placeholders.

event_thumbnail_2.description: Concert crowd reference image for event list placeholders.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use standard React Native components (View, Text, TouchableOpacity, SafeAreaView, ScrollView, FlatList) combined with Tailwind classes via NativeWind (or standard StyleSheet mapping).
DO NOT use web-only HTML elements (div, span, etc.).
Implement real-time WebSocket connection to the FastAPI backend for immediate sync and duplicate detection.
The camera scanner must use expo-camera and be configured to scan PDF417 barcodes specifically, as this is the standard for Colombian Cedulas.
Implement an offline queue using AsyncStorage or SQLite that pushes pending scans to the backend when the WebSocket reconnects.
Always provide immediate haptic feedback and clear visual cues (Green vs Red) on the scanner screen.
Ensure all interactive components include the specified `data-testid` attributes.
